name: ftjm-chat
description: Cross-platform chat app with Electron, React, and Supabase

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:web && npm run build:main
scripts.package: npm run build && cd packages/main && npm run package
scripts.type-check: cd packages/shared && npm run type-check && cd ../web && npm run type-check && cd ../main && npm run type-check
scripts.postinstall: node -e "import { copyFileSync, constants } from 'fs'; try { copyFileSync('.env.example', '.env.local', constants.COPYFILE_EXCL); console.log('✅ .env.local created from .env.example'); } catch(e) { if(e.code !== 'EEXIST') console.error(e); }"
